title: Curator pass: pending-graduations Phase 2 partial landed
body: Solo Knowledge Curator Phase 2 partial completed under claim ba32e198. Removed two live resolved pending-graduations stubs after verifying archive bodies and permanent pattern homes, then regenerated the stale due index to name nine current due entries with owner-decision, implementation-lane, plugin-contract, or plan-hygiene routes. Validation: markdownlint passed, git diff --check passed, practice fitness informational remains CRITICAL (2 critical, 4 hard, 13 soft). pending-graduations.md remains critical; this is a partial drain, not closure.
